this makes my life so much easier!! honestly i love this

title: Best tab splitter when out with friends
content: I love this app! I whip it out every time I’m out with friends and it makes our lives so much easier!

content: 4/5, would give 5/5 if the venmo connection worked

author: Shayne--o

content: A very useful app indeed.

author: Abbrazi
title: Lifechanging
content: This app is so good, I’ve been using it for years and recommended it to basically everyone I know.

author: Jazabby
title: Not really simpler
content: Does what its supposed to, but frustrating to have to manage automatic tip addition each time I use it. Not all expenses are tip-able.

author: Capt. Lionel Mandrake
title: Used to work better
content: I’ve had this app forever and known the workarounds well but the last 3-4, admittedly infrequent uses, it’s failed horribly. Dropping items, tax, or adding something that isn’t a menu item.

author: Romance_geek
title: Best App
content: I use the app frequently with friends and it never fails!

author: JoMaMa Rocks!
title: Tips SUCK
content: Horrible! Mandatory tip calculations SUCK!

author: Alex Dinnouti
title: A Must-Have for Group Dining
content:
Great app with a clear mission, a simple interface, and excellent usability. It does exactly what it needs to do.

The app accurately scans most receipts and includes an editor for the few that need manual adjustments.

You can pass your phone around so everyone can tag their items, or share a code for friends who already have the app.

There’s also a birthday feature that lets you easily include or exclude the birthday person when splitting the bill.

author: Jes-NYC
title: Tax, Venmo
content: There’s no ability to add tax manually, venmo doesn’t connect

author: Mira0129
title: Annoying
content: I originally downloaded this a while ago but I forgot why I deleted it. Oh yeah redownloading it today gave me the refresher because if it’s a file of a receipt you can’t upload it and no matter how clear a screenshot is somehow it’s still blurry. Why tf would I download a receipt splitting app to hand split a 72 item receipt when I’m trying single screenshot by single screenshot of a perfectly clear file and nope it’s blurry. HOW ITS CLEAR ASF IT CANT GET ANY CLEARER

author: David C Tran
title: Great.  Missing Zelle
content: Really like this app. Great for groups. Would love for more payment options. Zelle maybe?

author: Jhmph
title: Tax input not working
content: The app works great except for the fact that the tax button is broken and you cannot calculate the correct amount

author: Littlebrittles
title: Doesn’t Capture Well
content: Tried about four times and after the initial photo is taken of the bill, it only captures specific items and omits several others. This app might work if you’re at a restaurant splitting one item, but don’t count on it working for anything else but that.

author: jburga29
title: Tax option not working
content: I think this app is overall great, but not sure why it doesn’t allow me to change the tax section. I found a loophole to add it as an item but it seems like that’s an issue that needs to resolve.

author: AdamGramling
title: Cannot upload images
content: Missing the most basic feature… you can only use if you take a photo of the receipt. You cannot upload a previous photo

author: Sirpingalot
title: Great for splitting tabs
content: Always a problem with restaurants not splitting it into too many cheques. But this app makes it a breeze. Scans your receipt so you don’t have to hand type everything and lets you pick what you ate. I’ve never tried the bank integration but splitting the bill has definitely become less of a hassle. Totally recommend if you are usually in groups that need it split.

author: aprauhl18
title: Discounts Incorrect
content:
There needs to be an option to add a percentage as a discount and not just the total of the discount itself. It’s not calculating each persons total correct because it’s splitting the discount with everyone. How would it know where the $120 discount came from? When everyone received 20% off the bill? When I do the math myself it’s not splitting or calculating correctly. The option to add a discount on the bill as a “percentage” would be very helpful. 

Same thing with adding tax. I should be able to insert the tax percentage like I can with tip instead of only being able to add the amount manually.

author: SoCal Kman
title: It works!
content: With all the eating with different families and sports team, Tab is super easy to use. I took a picture of the receipt and it OCR and created a receipt in the app that I can just click line items. It auto added tax and I can adjust the tip amount. So easy!

author: Mmcnuggy
title: Game Changer for Groups
content: Love using this to split the dinner bill with my friends! Makes it so much easier on the wait staff and we don’t worry about getting totals mixed up.

author: chrisismad223
title: Just what i needed
content: simple, makes math and recording easier. no need for all the integration nonsense but venmo could be nice if they got it working.

author: wtfthyarealltaken
title: Great tool, but needs options
content: It’s an awesome free tool EXCEPT it factors tip without tax, which is not how most people determine tip. When you select 20% somewhere it’s based on Total to include tax. I’m going to have to look for another tool or hope they add an option.

author: Bel_8675309
title: I love this app!
content: I love this app sooo much. I’ve been using it for years and it’s such a huge help when you dine out with friends/people and you want to split the tab evenly. You might have to manually input things once in a while when the camera can’t get the whole receipt but other than that it’s a great app!

author: Dg-000
title: Not accurate
content: The app is convenient at times but not very accurate. I’ve tried to use it plenty of times with well lit and clear pictures and the numbers it pulls is crazy sometimes…not really worth it

author: Fishy Fishy bubbles
title: Good but glitchy
content: It’s an awesome tool when it works. The issue is it doesn’t work half the time. It will often record the date or time on the receipt as a price and throw everything off. Or sometimes it won’t scan or read items randomly in the middle of the bill. Sometimes I have to scan receipts two or three times before it starts to work.

author: Adrian...415
title: One of the best apps but…
content: It saves sonic headache of having to manually divide up restaurant items buttttt I wish you can connect to Venmo. It has the option but it’s stuck on the Authorizing App screen:/ Besides that, great app

author: Nserrano1999
title: Almost perfect
content: This app would be perfect if each user splitting the bill had a different color assigned. That way it would be easier to track which line items have been assigned to each user. For share items the line could have multiple colors.

author: ekrasno
title: Ok
content: Works ok. Pretty difficult to navigate at first and still difficult after you figure out how it works. Not very intuitive. Can’t edit bills after 1 week.

author: YvesTaty
title: Terrible
content: It’s not calculating the bill correctly

author: P414ounce
title: The best!
content: Tab has saved so much time and energy splitting the bill with friends. I only wish the Venmo functionality would work. THAT would be totally 5/5 stars.

author: Whydoineedthisfr
title: Garbage
content: Garbage

author: LocalTraveler
title: Used to be good, much better options available these days
content:
For many years, this was my go to app to split the dinner bill. It wasn’t always perfect, but it was the best available at the time. It’s pretty frustrating when it gets it wrong though, because when you’re at dinner with a large group of friends…trying to figure it out, there’s a lot of pressure and it just gets confusing not knowing which price it got wrong.

Thankfully, tech has improved, and now I can’t live without “fairShare - split the bill”.   It has all the bells and whistles and features you could want while still keeping the UI simple and clean. Best part is it’s always accurate and all my friends can pick their own items without downloading the app or needing a login. Easy Peezy.

author: Docular123
title: Rarely works
content: It only works sometimes and it’s so frustrating. You would think we have better technology by now

author: Assassinfkfndba
content: Works so well idk how it’s free

author: JannaH16
title: Game changer!
content: Using this app on a girl’s trip made splitting the costs so easy! Unlike most similar apps, I was able to split the tabs easily, without everyone having to have an account or join the bill to claim their items. 10/10 recommend!

author: Jackson00000001
title: Everything I need
content: How is this not a regular used app?? It’s amazing, adjustable, easy to use and integrates with either in-vivo pictures or pictures I’ve previously taken! I’ve had the “pleasure” of being the guy who calculates what everyone owes me and their tax and tip. This breaks it down into each person’s stuff, lets me add multiple people to the same item, and even divide an item into 3rds, 4ths, or 5ths! It’s awesome, cannot recommend it enough

author: lavendergoyl
title: hallucinating money
content: the first page of the app works great from scanning the receipt picture, but for some reason on the subtotal page it was adding a ton of money from nowhere to my bill. also can’t connect venmo.

author: bikthovcsaf
title: Great App!!
content: Smooth process and simple interface

author: Heudncomejbfbfjnx
title: Love!!!!
content: I absolutely love this app, it makes group dinners so easy to spilt. I recommend it to all my friends!

it’s truly as if this app was built to
be difficult to use. it’s horrible at scanning a picture of a receipt. you have to enter in manually and it takes ages. the bills auto delete after just a couple of weeks.

title: Tab
content: Great app
